DP.174.0000:
[0103,0000]: Hold it!
Don’t go off without me!\f
You’re challenging the Pokémon
League, aren’t you?\f
That’s why I’m here, too.\f
Let’s see who’s more worthy of making
the challenge with a battle!\f
DP.174.0001:
[0103,0000]: I guess I’m not ready
for the Pokémon League if I’m losing\r
to you!\f
Darn it!
You watch, though!\f
I’ll get tougher and win my way
through the Pokémon League!\f
Because I’m going to become the
Champion, the toughest Trainer!\f
[0103,0001]! You’d better not
lose to anyone before me!\f
DP.174.0002:
Let me confirm that you are qualified
to challenge the Pokémon League.\f
So! Let us examine the Gym Badges
you gathered from Sinnoh.\f
Oreburgh City’s Coal Badge!\f
Eterna City’s Forest Badge!\f
Veilstone City’s Cobble Badge!\f
Pastoria City’s Fen Badge!\f
Hearthome City’s Relic Badge!\f
Canalave City’s Mine Badge!\f
Snowpoint City’s Icicle Badge!\f
And...
Sunyshore City’s Beacon Badge!\f
DP.174.0003:
Very well!\f
Trainer, you’ve indeed collected
all the Gym Badges of Sinnoh!\f
Demonstrate the power that brought
you here and go for glory!
DP.174.0004:
You will be facing the Elite Four
of the Pokémon League.\f
If you can’t beat all four of them
in a row, you have to start from\r
the first one again.
DP.174.0005:
Your Pokémon are so calm even though
they’re going up against the Elite\r
Four.\f
I like how they’re so loose and
relaxed.
